items.name_en: Medium size 24.5 cm🤩🤩🤩Chanel 24p Black Gold Hobo Medium. I've always liked the casual style of the 22 bag, the only downside is that it has no zipper and no sense of security. Now I finally found a practical and durable caviar leather hobo bag. At first, I thought this bag looked ugly, but later saw someone point out that the large size dips down. I got hooked on the casual vibe. I asked the SA when I went to pick up my New Year's gift, and they said only the medium size 24.5 cm was in stock. The only in-stock black gold one the SA couldn't find, so I tried the caramel first. After coming back, I couldn't get it out of my mind, so I told the SA to keep the black gold for me if they found it. I thought if I didn't get it, it was fate. I didn't expect the SA to be so nice. The logo is small and cute. Dimensions: 19 x 24.5 x 9cm Style A S 4293

items.name_en: Medium Size🎖️🎖️🎖️ 24 X 26 X 9.5 cm In Stock🚩🚩🚩🆕CHANEL 24a hobo This season❤️‍🔥❤️‍🔥 this hobo is a must-have! Extremely lightweight! It fits almost everything you need, including your phone! Compared to previous hobo bags, this one has a fuller shape. The leather is oil-waxed patent leather.⛅️⛅️ The shoulder strap length is sufficient and it holds up well with heavy autumn/winter clothes! It might look average in photos, but once you touch the real thing and try it on, you'll love it! Black is very stable! The brown coffee color has a particularly retro vibe!

items.name_en: Midnight Black OHANEL🚩🚩 Oversized logo suede double pocket chain bag! This brown double pocket bag is really special🤩, the black overall body has a great vibe, and it looks very cool when worn! Definitely the king of trendy bright colors. The calfskin material feels super soft and smooth, ready to grab and go, super nice. Chanel Chance really delivers! You can take it away~! I love its simple, casual, and free-spirited style. This color double pocket bag is really beautiful! The material feels like a combination of suede and leather, not as soft as pure suede, but not as hard either, just right. This color is also very good for matching with clothes😍😍 Dimensions: 34x25x10cm

items.name_en: Milk White🔮🔮🔮🚩🚩🚩Calfskin CHANEL 26C Hobo Bag, writing a new definition of elegance with a casual attitude! The perfect blend of soft calfskin and metal chains interprets an effortless sense of luxury. In fashion rules, the word "wanderer" has never been so elegant. The Hobo Bag, with its unique lazy silhouette and exquisite craftsmanship, redefines the perfect balance between casualness and luxury. Design Highlights: Unconventional elegance, crafted from premium soft leather, presenting a lazy yet structured silhouette. The double chain ⛓️ closure design is the iconic element of this bag; the metal and leather intertwined strap is not only beautiful but also provides a comfortable wearing experience. The spacious interior breaks the stereotype of niche bags being impractical. Whether it's daily essentials or small items, it can be easily stored. Style Matching: The perfect companion from casual to formal 👨‍❤️‍💋‍👨, adding points to the overall look. When paired with a dress or a little black dress, it adds a touch of elegance and sophistication to the overall look. A conquering item in the fashion world, this bag has become the first choice for many stars and fashion icons. From Zhou Xun, Liu Wen to Chen Weiting, whether male or female, everyone can carry their own style, proving the charm of this design transcends gender! Dimensions: Length 35CM, Width 14CM, Height 45cm
